inputs.label: Climber Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the climber including all gear (harness, rope, hardware) in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the climber including all gear (harness, rope, hardware) in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tırmanıcının tüm ekipmanı (emniyet kemeri, ip, donanım) dahil kilogram cinsinden kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des Kletterers inkl. gesamter Ausrüstung (Gurt, Seil, Hardware) in Kilogramm.

inputs.label: Fall Factor
inputs.businessContext: Fall factor (ratio of free-fall height to length of dynamic rope in the system), typically between 0 and 2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fall factor (ratio of free-fall height to length of dynamic rope in the system), typically between 0 and 2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düşme faktörü (serbest düşüş yüksekliğinin sistemdeki dinamik ip uzunluğuna oranı), tipik olarak 0 ile 2 arasında.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sturzfaktor (Verhältnis von freier Fallhöhe zur Länge des dynamischen Seils im System), typischerweise zwischen 0 und 2.

inputs.label: Rated Impact Force
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturer-rated impact force of the rope for UIAA standard test (80 kg mass, 1.77 fall factor) in kilonewtons.

businessContext_i18n.en: Manufacturer-rated impact force of the rope for UIAA standard test (80 kg mass, 1.77 fall factor) in kilonewtons.
businessContext_i18n.tr: UIAA standart testi (80 kg kütle, 1.77 düşme faktörü) için ipin üretici tarafından belirtilen darbe kuvveti, kilonewton cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Hersteller-Nenn-Aufprallkraft des Seils für UIAA-Standardtest (80 kg Masse, 1,77 Sturzfaktor) in Kilonewton.

inputs.label: Rated Mass
inputs.businessContext: Standard test mass used for UIAA rating, typically 80 kg.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard test mass used for UIAA rating, typically 80 kg.
businessContext_i18n.tr: UIAA derecelendirmesi için kullanılan standart test kütlesi, tipik olarak 80 kg.

inputs.label: Rated Fall Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard test fall factor used for UIAA rating, typically 1.77.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard test fall factor used for UIAA rating, typically 1.77.
businessContext_i18n.tr: UIAA derecelendirmesi için kullanılan standart test düşme faktörü, tipik olarak 1.77.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Design safety factor applied to the estimated force (e.g., 1.0 for theoretical, 1.5 for equipment margin).

businessContext_i18n.en: Design safety factor applied to the estimated force (e.g., 1.0 for theoretical, 1.5 for equipment margin).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahmini kuvvete uygulanan tasarım güvenlik faktörü (örneğin, teorik için 1.0, ekipman marjı için 1.5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Auslegungssicherheitsfaktor für die geschätzte Kraft (z. B. 1,0 für theoretisch, 1,5 für Ausrüstungsspielraum).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
